prompt: Create a minor 1-4-5 progression in A minor (Am - Dm - Em) in 4/4.

args.content:

  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr progression 4

  ch 6 HiHat
